SESSION.NAME: defaultSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnostic session enables the default diagnostic session in the server(s) and does not support any diagnostic application timeout handling provisions (e.g., TesterPresent service is not necessary to keep the session active). A server shall always start the default diagnostic session when powered up. If no other diagnostic session is started, then the default diagnostic session shall be running as long as the server is powered.

SESSION.NAME: programmingSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession enables all diagnostic services required to support the memory programming of a server. Regardless of whether the programmingSession runs in boot software or not, the ECU shall automatically suspend logging of DTCs and suspend transmission of non-diagnostic frames when entering the programmingSession.

SESSION.NAME: extendedDiagnosticSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession is used to enable timed diagnostic service functionality (e.g., I/O control). The diagnostic functionality in this session shall also include all supported diagnostic functionality supported in the defaultSession.

SECURITY_LEVEL.NAME: Send Key (Security Level 0x01)
SECURITY_LEVEL.DESCRIPTION: Security Access Level 0x01 is used in the programming session (0x02) only.Used for bootloader routines.

SECURITY_LEVEL.NAME: Send Key (Security Level 0x03)
SECURITY_LEVEL.DESCRIPTION: Security Access Level 0x03 is used in the extendedDiagnosticSession (0x03) and is intended to be used by Ford EOL and Service organizations. Used for restraints routines and configuration DIDs.

DTC_FAILURE_TYPE.DESCRIPTION: Alive / Sequence Counter Incorrect / Not Updated

DTC_SNAPSHOT_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: The first time since DTC information was cleared or the DTC was aged that DTC status bit 3 (confirmedDTC) is set to 1.
The last time DTC fault detection counter reaches its maximum value of +127.

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: Operation cycle counter #2
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: Number of operation cycles since the DTC fault detection counter last reached its maximum value of +127 (since DTC information was last cleared). The operation cycles during which the test was not completed shall be excluded

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: Operation cycle counter #3
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: Number of operation cycles since the DTC fault detection counter first reached its maximum value of +127 (since DTC information was last cleared). All operation cycles, including those in which the test has not been completed shall be included.

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: Operation cycle counter #4
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: Number of operation cycles during which the DTC fault detection counter reached its maximum value of +127 (since DTC information was last cleared).

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: DTC Fault Detection Counter
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: The purpose of this counter is to provide a mechanism for filtering the results of a low-level fault detection process so that test results (pass and fail) can be qualified before setting any DTC status bits.

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: Maximum DTC Fault Detection Counter This Operation Cycle
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: The maximum value the DTC Fault Detection Counter has reached during current operation cycle.

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: Maximum DTC Fault Detection Counter Since Last Clear
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: The maximum value the DTC Fault Detection Counter has reached since the last time DTC information was cleared.

DTC_OPERATION_CYCLES_SUPPORTED.DTC_OPERATION_CYCLE: (Operation cycle starts when the ECU starts/wakes up from sleep state/recovers from reset/ when ECU is ON) and Verify_Start time has elapsed on the SecOC module
Operation cycle starts when input voltage enters operating voltage range and ends when input voltage exits operating voltage range.

Operation cycle starts when input voltage enters operating voltage range and ends when input voltage exits operating voltage range.Operation cycle starts when input voltage enters operating voltage range and ends when input voltage exits operating voltage range.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Qualified in 200 msec if Lateral acceleration is outside of expected range (triggered by aggressive driving, RCM mounting, or RCM) Dequalified in 8 sec if Lateral acceleration is within expected range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Set VehLatAActl_D_QF=2 (Not_Within_Specifications) until the fault condition recovers.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 12 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise RIL will be off. 2) Affects receivers of IMU data. 3)ESC warning lamp may be illuminated. RSC and ESC may be inoperable. DTC 0xC452-86 reported. CCD (VDM): will result in a graying out of the menu selects and high suspension stiffness. DTC 0xC45200 reported after 5s FDSM: Active City Stop disabled with a Warning. DTC 0xC415 set against the ABS. See the associated ECU's Part II Spec for more information.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Qualified in 200 msec if Longitudinal acceleration is outside of expected range (triggered by aggressive driving, RCM mounting, or RCM) Dequalified in 8 sec if Longitudinal acceleration is within expected range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Set VehLongAActl_D_QF=2 (Not_Within_Specifications) until the fault condition recovers.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 12 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise RIL will be off. 2) Affects receivers of IMU data. 3)ESC warning lamp may be illuminated. RSC, ESC, or ABS may be inoperable. DTC 0xC452-86 reported. CCD (VDM): will result in a graying out of the menu selects and high suspension stiffness. DTC 0xC45200 reported after 5s See the associated ECU's Part II Spec for more information.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC 0xC45200 reported after 5s ACC/FCW: disabled with a Warning. DTC 0xC41500 set against the ABS. FDSM: Active City Stop disabled with a Warning. DTC 0xC41500 set against the ABS. ABS: ESC warning lamp may be illuminated. ESC, LLK, HSA, CMS deactivated. See the associated ECU's Part II Spec for more information.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in < 5sec (during Pre-Drive) or 5-6 sec (during Drive) if circuit short to ground exists. Fault Dequalified in 5-6 sec if circuit short to ground no longer exists.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 19 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment will be attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 64 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified atleast once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device .

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Battery Voltage input in operating voltage range and associated feature not enabled in calibration file
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Incorrect Component Installed. Fault qualifies during Pre-Drive in < 5seconds
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment function of ECU not affected.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 64 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Sensor circuit is shorted to ground and Fault maturation time of 5-6 seconds is met. Fault dematures in 5-6 seconds once fault condition is removed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: When the Seatbelt sensor is faulted, ECU will use default settings for deployment decisions for associated deployment devices. The ECU will report the Faulty state of the Seatbelt Sensor over CAN bus to IPC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 51 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) If the seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm, the RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. The RIL will not be set if the Seatbelt Sensor is not used as an input into the algorithm. 3) Potential change in deployment performance for affected devices if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm 4) Potential loss of seatbelt warning function if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input for seatbelt warning.

The RIL will not be set if the Seatbelt Sensor is not used as an input into the algorithm. 3) Potential change in deployment performance for affected devices if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm 4) Potential loss of seatbelt warning function if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input for seatbelt warning.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 38 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Incorrect Component Installed. Fault qualifies during Pre-Drive in < 5seconds

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault is set upon receiving 3 consecutive OCS Status messages with OCSLevel1Error = YES .This DTC will be logged only when Ignition Status is Run and is not logged in Energy Reserve or Extended Energy Reserve mode. Fault is removed upon receiving 3 consecutive OCS Status message with OCSLevel1rror = NO
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU uses last valid value for signal OCS Status in message 0x265 until the invalid signal fault is qualified during the key cycle / from the begining of the key cycle. After the fault is qualified then OCS Status is considered as "Indeterminate"
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 16 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range and associated feature not enabled in calibration file
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault could be set due to any of the following reasons:This DTC will be logged only when Ignition Status is Run and is not logged in Energy Reserve or Extended Energy Reserve mode. 1)Upon Receipt of 0x265/0x453 OCS messages for 6 seconds when the OCS is not expected 2)Upon Recepit of 3 consecutive OCS 0x265 messages with Incorrect OCS Cal ID which is not matching with programmed DE03. Fault is removed upon recepit of correct OCS Cal ID which is matching with programmed DE03.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU uses last valid value for signal OCS Status in message 0x265 until the invalid signal fault is qualified during the key cycle / from the begining of the key cycle. After the fault is qualified then OCS Status is considered as "Indeterminate"
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed. 1)AFC = 17 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2)The DTC 80A0 4A(When RCM receives 0x265 message when it is not expecting) remains active for the key cycle even if the fault condition is removed unless clear codes command is issued.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault is set upon receiving 8 consecutive 0x265 messages with "Indeterminate" OCS State.This DTC will be logged only when Ignition Status is Run and is not logged in Energy Reserve or Extended Energy Reserve mode. Fault is removed upon receiving valid OCS state other than "indeterminate" in 0x265 message.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU uses "Indeterminate" value for signal OCS Status in message 0x265 until the invalid signal fault is qualified during the key cycle / from the begining of the key cycle. After the fault is qualified then OCS Status is considered as "Indeterminate"
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 16 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault could be set for any of the following reasons:This DTC will be logged only when Ignition Status is Run and is not logged in Energy Reserve or Extended Energy Reserve mode. 1)Receive OCS status message with invalid classification for 8 sec. 2)Receive BeltWarnThres_D_Stat = Faulty for 8 sec Fault is dematured for the following reasons. 1)Upon receipt of 1 valid OCS Calsiification signal state in the OCS Status message. 2)Upon receipt of 1 valid state other than "Faulty" in the signal "BeltWarnThres_D_Stat"
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU uses "Indeterminate" value for signal OCS Status in message 0x265 until the invalid(w.r.t OCS Status) signal fault is qualified during the key cycle / from the begining of the key cycle. After the fault is qualified then OCS Status is considered as "Indeterminate"
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 68 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault is set upon receipt of 3 consecutive OCS Status messages 0x265 with OCSLevel2rror = YES .This DTC will be logged only when Ignition Status is Run and is not logged in Energy Reserve or Extended Energy Reserve mode. Fault is dematured upon receipt of 3 consecutive OCS Status Messages 0x265 with OCSLevel2rror = NO
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: deployment performance is unaffected by this DTC
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 17 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Driver Seat Track Position Restraints Sensor

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Sensor circuit is shorted to ground and Fault maturation time of 5-6 seconds is met. Fault dematures in 5-6 seconds once fault condition is removed.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: When the Seattrack sensor is faulted, ECU will use default settings for deployment decisions for associated deployment devices.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 49 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. 3) Potential change in deployment performance for affected devices

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault is matured upon receipt of "Not_Supported" or "AirbagOff_Indicator_fault" or "Both indicator faulted" or Invalid or Unused1 or Unused2 states for 6 sec in the signal PassRstrnInd_Stat (0x78) when CAN Controlled PADI is expected. This DTC will be logged only when Ignition Status is Run and is not logged in Energy Reserve or Extended Energy Reserve mode. Fault Dematures Upon receipt of 1 good value ("Normal" or "AirbagOn_Indicator_fault") in signal PassRstrnInd_Stat (0x78)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU functionality is not affected.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Hardwired PADI Lamp circuit open and fault maturation time of 6 seconds during Drive or within 4 seconds during Pre-Drive is met. Fault dematures in 6 seconds when fault condition is removed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU functionality is not affected.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1)AFC = 18 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2)Potential Loss of Passenger Airbag Status indication. 3)The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Battery Voltage input in operating voltage range and associated feature not enabled in calibration file
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: For Hardwired PADI configuration: PADI Device not configured but existent and fault maturation time of 6 seconds during Drive or within 4 seconds during Pre-Drive is met. Fault dematures in 6 seconds once fault condition is removed. For CAN PADI configuration: Fault is matured upon receiving the signal PassRstrnInd_Stat =0x01or 0x03 or 0x04 for 6seconds when CAN PADI is not expected. The DTC will be logged only when Ignition_Status is RUN and the module is not in Energy Reserve or Extended Energy Reserve mode. Fault dematures upon receipt of 1 good value(0x02,0x05,0x06,0x07) in signal PassRstrnInd_Stat (0x78) For Menu ACS configuration: Fault is matured upon receiving the signal RstrnOnPsngr_D_RqMnu with ON/OFF with update bit fresh when Menu ACS not expected. Fault is also matured upon receiving the signal RstrnOnPsngr_D_RqMnu with Configured off when Menu ACS expected Fault dematures upon reeceiving the signal RstrnOnPsngr_D_RqMnu with values other than ON/OFF
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU functionality is not affected.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1)AFC = 18 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2)The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Sensor circuit is shorted to ground and Fault maturation time of 5-6 seconds is met. Fault dematures in 5-6 seconds once fault condition is removed.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: When the sensor is faulted, ECU will use default settings for deployment decisions for associated deployment devices.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 56 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) the RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. 3) Potential change in deployment performance for affected devices

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Crash Event Storage Full and Locked

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault is logged immediately upon Airbag deployment event is occurred,Data is written and locked.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Fault permanently latched in vehicles subject to 49 CFR Part 563 NHTSA EDR Final Rule. 3)Fault may be cleared on vehicles not subject to 49 CFR Part 563 NHTSA EDR Final Rule. (See DID $DE05 and Special Procedure - Event Data Recorder Unlock).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Event data from subsequent impact event will not be recorded

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in < 5sec (during Pre-Drive) or 5-6 sec (during Drive) if circuit short to ground exists. Fault Dequalified in 5-6 sec if circuit short to ground no longer exists.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 58 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 63 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Potential loss of Event Indication
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 53 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise No RIL when fault present.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault is matured upon receipt of "Not_Supported",or "AirbagOn_Indicator_fault", or "Both indicators faulted" or Invalid or Unused1 or Unused2 for 6 sec in the signal PassRstrnInd_Stat (0x78) If CAN controlled dual PADI is expected. This DTC will be logged only when Ignition Status is Run and is not logged in Energy Reserve or Extended Energy Reserve mode. Fault Dematures Upon receipt of 1 good value ("Normal" or "AirbagOff_Indicator_fault" in signal PassRstrnInd_Stat (0x78)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU functionality is not affected.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Passenger Airbag Enable Indicator may not perform as designed.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Hardwired PADI Lamp shorted to ground and fault maturation time of 6 seconds during Drive or within 4 seconds during Pre-Drive is met. Fault dematures in 6 seconds when fault condition is removed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU functionality is not affected.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 18 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) Potential loss of Passenger Airbag Status indication. 3)The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Hardwired PADI Lamp circuit open and fault maturation time of 6 seconds during Drive or within 4 seconds during Pre-Drive is met. Fault dematures in 6 seconds when fault condition is removed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU functionality is not affected.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 18 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) Potential loss of Passenger Airbag Status indication. 3)The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Battery Voltage input in operating voltage range and associated feature not enabled in calibration file
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: For Hardwired PADI configuration: PADI Device not configured but existent and fault maturation time of 6 seconds during Drive or within 4 seconds during Pre-Drive is met.Fault dematures in 6 seconds once fault condition is removed. For CAN PADI configuration: Fault is matured upon receiving the signal PassRstrnInd_Stat (0x78) = 0x01 or 0x02 or 0x04 for 6 seconds when CAN PADI is not expected. The DTC will be logged only when Ignition Status is RUN and the module is not in Energy Reserve or Extended Energy Reserve mode. Fault dematures upon receipt of 1 good value (0x03,0x05,0x06,0x07) in signal PassRstrnInd_Stat (0x78). Hardwired controlled Dual or single PADI or HSC controlled. The presence of both hardwired input and HSCAN other than Not_supported state should set this DTC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU functionality is not affected.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1)AFC = 18 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2)The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 31 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Second Row Passenger Side Airbag Deployment Control

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in < 5sec (during Pre-Drive) or 5-6 sec (during Drive) if circuit short to ground exists. Fault Dequalified in 5-6 sec if circuit short to ground no longer exists.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 27 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. 3) Potential Loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device .

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in < 5sec (during Pre-Drive) or 5-6 sec (during Drive) if circuit short to battery exists. Fault Dequalified in 5-6 sec if circuit short to battery no longer exists
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 27 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. 3) Potential Loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device .

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in 5-6 sec if circuit resistance is above Open Circuit Resistance threshold. Fault Dequalified in 5-6 sec if circuit resistance returns to normal. Resistance threshold for Open circuit: above 5 Ohm
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 27 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. 3) Potential Loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device .

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in 5-6 sec if circuit resistance is below Circuit low Resistance threshold. Fault Dequalifies in 5-6 sec if circuit resistance returns to normal. Resistance threshold for Low circuit resistance: below 1.8 Ohm (With Clockspring). Resistance threshold for Low circuit resistance: below 1.6 Ohm (without Clockspring)..
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment will be attempted, even if faulted
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 27 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified atleast once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in < 5sec (during Pre-Drive) or 5-6 sec (during Drive) if firing loop is cross coupled with another firing loop. Fault Dequalifies in 5-6 sec if cross couple condition no longer exists
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment will be attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 27 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified atleast once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device .

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Battery Voltage input in operating voltage range and associated feature not enabled in calibration file
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Incorrect Component Installed. Fault qualifies during Pre-Drive in < 5seconds
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment function of ECU not affected.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 27 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Second Row Driver Side Seatbelt Sensor

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Wireless Beltminder Control Module message (0x487) is set to Faulty for this device and Fault maturation time of 5-6 seconds is met.Fault dematures in 5-6 seconds once fault condition is removed.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: When the Seatbelt sensor is faulted, ECU will use default settings for deployment decisions for associated deployment devices. The ECU will report the Faulty state of the Seatbelt Sensor over CAN bus to IPC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 75 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) If the seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm, the RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. The RIL will not be set if the Seatbelt Sensor is not used as an input into the algorithm. 3) Potential change in deployment performance for affected devices if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm 4) Potential loss of seatbelt warning function if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input for seatbelt warning.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Sensor circuit is shorted to ground and Fault maturation time of 5-6 seconds is met. Fault dematures in 5-6 seconds once fault condition is removed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: When the Seatbelt sensor is faulted, ECU will use default settings for deployment decisions for associated deployment devices. The ECU will report the Faulty state of the Seatbelt Sensor over CAN bus to IPC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 75 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) If the seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm, the RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. The RIL will not be set if the Seatbelt Sensor is not used as an input into the algorithm. 3) Potential change in deployment performance for affected devices if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm 4) Potential loss of seatbelt warning function if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input for seatbelt warning.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Sensor circuit is shorted to battery and fault maturation time of 5-6 seconds is met . Fault dematures in 5-6 seconds once fault condition is removed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: When the Seatbelt sensor is faulted, ECU will use default settings for deployment decisions for associated deployment devices. The ECU will report the Faulty state of the Seatbelt Sensor over CAN bus to IPC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 75 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) If the seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm, the RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. The RIL will not be set if the Seatbelt Sensor is not used as an input into the algorithm. 3) Potential change in deployment performance for affected devices if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm 4) Potential loss of seatbelt warning function if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input for seatbelt warning.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Sensor circuit is Open and Fault maturation time of 5-6 seconds is met. Or, Alternatively, an open circuit on the common ground return for the slow sensors exists and Fault maturation time of 5-6 seconds is met. Fault dematures in 5-6 seconds once fault condition is removed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: When the Seatbelt sensor is faulted, ECU will use default settings for deployment decisions for associated deployment devices. The ECU will report the Faulty state of the Seatbelt Sensor over CAN bus to IPC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 75 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) If the seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm, the RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. The RIL will not be set if the Seatbelt Sensor is not used as an input into the algorithm. 3) Potential change in deployment performance for affected devices if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm 4) Potential loss of seatbelt warning function if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input for seatbelt warning.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Sensor circuit current out of range ( >7.9mA and <9.6mA) and fault maturation of 5-6 seconds is met. Fault dematures in 5-6 seconds once fault condition is removed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: When the Seatbelt sensor is faulted, ECU will use default settings for deployment decisions for associated deployment devices. The ECU will report the Faulty state of the Seatbelt Sensor over CAN bus to IPC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 75 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) If the seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm, the RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. The RIL will not be set if the Seatbelt Sensor is not used as an input into the algorithm. 3) Potential change in deployment performance for affected devices if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm 4) Potential loss of seatbelt warning function if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input for seatbelt warning.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Sensor is cross-coupled with another slow sensor and fault maturation time of 5-6 seconds is met. During Pre-Drive, fault maturation can be less than 5-6 seconds. Or, for Restive type slow Sensors, Sensor Common ground return is open and fault maturation time of 5-6 seconds is met.. Fault dematures in 5-6 seconds once fault condition is removed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: When the Seatbelt sensor is faulted, ECU will use default settings for deployment decisions for associated deployment devices. The ECU will report the Faulty state of the Seatbelt Sensor over CAN bus to IPC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 75 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) If the seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm, the RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. The RIL will not be set if the Seatbelt Sensor is not used as an input into the algorithm. 3) Potential change in deployment performance for affected devices if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm 4) Potential loss of seatbelt warning function if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input for seatbelt warning.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range. and associated feature not enabled in calibration file
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Device not configured but existent and Fault maturation time of 5-6sec during pre-drive are met
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: No effect on deployment decision
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1)AFC = 75 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise may be solid RIL 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle and the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Sensor circuit is Open and Fault maturation time of 5-6 seconds is met. Or, Alternatively, an open circuit on the common ground return for the slow sensors exists and Fault maturation time of 5-6 seconds is met.. Fault dematures in 5-6 seconds once fault condition is removed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: When the Seatbelt sensor is faulted, ECU will use default settings for deployment decisions for associated deployment devices. The ECU will report the Faulty state of the Seatbelt Sensor over CAN bus to IPC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 76 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) If the seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm, the RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. The RIL will not be set if the Seatbelt Sensor is not used as an input into the algorithm. 3) Potential change in deployment performance for affected devices if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm 4) Potential loss of seatbelt warning function if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input for seatbelt warning.

The RIL will not be set if the Seatbelt Sensor is not used as an input into the algorithm. 3) Potential change in deployment performance for affected devices if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm 4) Potential loss of seatbelt warning function if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input for seatbelt warning.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Device not configured but existent and Fault maturation time of 5-6sec during pre-drive are met
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: No effect on deployment decision
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1)AFC = 76 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise may be solid RIL 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle and the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Second Row Driver Side Seatbelt Pretensioner Deployment Control

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in < 5sec (during Pre-Drive) or 5-6 sec (during Drive) if circuit short to ground exists. Fault Dequalified in 5-6 sec if circuit short to ground no longer exists.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 35 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in < 5sec (during Pre-Drive) or 5-6 sec (during Drive) if circuit short to battery exists. Fault Dequalified in 5-6 sec if circuit short to battery no longer exists
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 35 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in 5-6 sec if circuit resistance is above Open Circuit Resistance threshold. Fault Dequalified in 5-6 sec if circuit resistance returns to normal. Resistance threshold for Open circuit: above 5 Ohm
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 35 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. 3) Potential Loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device .

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in 5-6 sec if circuit resistance is below Circuit low Resistance threshold. Fault Dequalifies in 5-6 sec if circuit resistance returns to normal. Resistance threshold for Low circuit resistance: below 1.8 Ohm (With Clockspring). Resistance threshold for Low circuit resistance: below 1.6 Ohm (without Clockspring)..
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment will be attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 35 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified atleast once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in < 5sec (during Pre-Drive) or 5-6 sec (during Drive) if firing loop is cross coupled with another firing loop. Fault Dequalifies in 5-6 sec if cross couple condition no longer exists
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment will be attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 35 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified atleast once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device .

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Battery Voltage input in operating voltage range and associated feature not enabled in calibration file
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Incorrect Component Installed. Fault qualifies during Pre-Drive in < 5seconds
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment function of ECU not affected.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 35 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in 5-6 sec if circuit resistance is below Circuit low Resistance threshold. Fault Dequalifies in 5-6 sec if circuit resistance returns to normal. Resistance threshold for Low circuit resistance: below 1.8 Ohm (With Clockspring). Resistance threshold for Low circuit resistance: below 1.6 Ohm (without Clockspring)..
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment will be attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 36 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified atleast once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in < 5sec (during Pre-Drive) or 5-6 sec (during Drive) if firing loop is cross coupled with another firing loop. Fault Dequalifies in 5-6 sec if cross couple condition no longer exists
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment will be attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 36 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified atleast once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device .

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Incorrect Component Installed. Fault qualifies during Pre-Drive in < 5seconds
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment function of ECU not affected.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 36 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 41 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Second Row Driver Side Inflatable Seatbelt Deployment Control

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in < 5sec (during Pre-Drive) or 5-6 sec (during Drive) if circuit short to ground exists. Fault Dequalified in 5-6 sec if circuit short to ground no longer exists.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 65 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in < 5sec (during Pre-Drive) or 5-6 sec (during Drive) if circuit short to battery exists. Fault Dequalified in 5-6 sec if circuit short to battery no longer exists
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 65 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in 5-6 sec if circuit resistance is above Open Circuit Resistance threshold. Fault Dequalified in 5-6 sec if circuit resistance returns to normal. Resistance threshold for Open circuit: above 5 Ohm
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 65 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. 3) Potential Loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device .

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in 5-6 sec if circuit resistance is below Circuit low Resistance threshold. Fault Dequalifies in 5-6 sec if circuit resistance returns to normal. Resistance threshold for Low circuit resistance: below 1.8 Ohm (With Clockspring). Resistance threshold for Low circuit resistance: below 1.6 Ohm (without Clockspring)..
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment will be attempted, even if faulted
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 65 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified atleast once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in < 5sec (during Pre-Drive) or 5-6 sec (during Drive) if firing loop is cross coupled with another firing loop. Fault Dequalifies in 5-6 sec if cross couple condition no longer exists
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment will be attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 65 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified atleast once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device .

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Battery Voltage input in operating voltage range and associated feature not enabled in calibration file
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Incorrect Component Installed. Fault qualifies during Pre-Drive in < 5seconds
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment function of ECU not affected.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 65 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in < 5sec (during Pre-Drive) or 5-6 sec (during Drive) if circuit short to ground exists. Fault Dequalified in 5-6 sec if circuit short to ground no longer exists.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 65 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 79 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Pedestrian Impact Event Storage Full And Locked

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault is logged immediately upon pedestrian protection loop deployment event is occurred
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Fault permanently latched in vehicles subject to 49 CFR Part 563 NHTSA EDR Final Rule. 3)Fault may be cleared on vehicles not subject to 49 CFR Part 563 NHTSA EDR Final Rule. (See DID $DE05 and Special Procedure - Event Data Recorder Unlock).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Event data from subsequent impact event will not be recorded

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Pyrotechnic End of Life Activation Performed

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: On event(Deployment initiated by ISO 26021 tool.)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault is logged immediately upon detecting restraints deployment event initiated by an ISO 26021 tool.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: This DTC is permanantly latched.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following will be seen. 1)AFC = 13 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present 2)Commanded airbags have been deployed.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Fuel Cutoff will be requested by the RCM via the ENS and/or HSCAN.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 82 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise No RIL when fault present.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Short to ground on feed of sensor and fault condition present for 5 consecutive milliseconds Or, Feed of sensor shorted to a voltage that is less than the normal operating voltage of the sensor
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Fault condition is not recoverable after S-retries(S-Configurable) within the same ignition cycle.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 99 when Assembly Flash codes enabled

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Fault condition is not recoverable after S-retries(S-Configurable) within the same ignition cycle.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 99 when Assembly Flash codes

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Qualified in 200 msec if Sensor is not with in specification. Dequalified in 8 sec if Sensor is with in specification.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Set VehLongAActl_D_QF=2 (Not_Within_Specifications) until the fault condition recovers.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 99 when Assembly Flash codes enabled

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault is set within 5 milliseconds of continuous occurrence of either one of the following fault condtions: 1.Manchester Error (channel specific) - incorrect number of bits, timing violation, etc in manchester Bitstream or 2.Data Error (channel specific) - Parity or CRC error in manchester data or 3.Satellite sensor's wiring is shorted to another Satellite sensor's wiring.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Fault condition is not recoverable after S-retries(S-Configurable) within the same ignition cycle.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 99 when Assembly Flash codes enabled

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Short to Battery on feed of sensor and fault condition present for 5 consecutive milliseconds Or, Feed of sensor shorted to a voltage that is above the normal operating voltage of the sensor
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Fault condition is not recoverable after S-retries(S-Configurable) within the same ignition cycle. ECU deployment functionality may be affected
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 79 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault is set within 5 milliseconds of continuous occurrence of either one of the following fault condtion: 1.The sensor is connected where should not be 2. A sensor version which is not expected is connected to the module.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Fault condition is not recoverable within the same ignition cycle ECU deployment function is not affected

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Fault condition is not recoverable after S-retries(S-Configurable) within the same ignition cycle. ECU deployment functionality may be affected
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 79 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified atleast once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Third Row Driver Side Inflatable Seatbelt Deployment Control

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in < 5sec (during Pre-Drive) or 5-6 sec (during Drive) if circuit short to ground exists. Fault Dequalified in 5-6 sec if circuit short to ground no longer exists.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 65 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in < 5sec (during Pre-Drive) or 5-6 sec (during Drive) if circuit short to battery exists. Fault Dequalified in 5-6 sec if circuit short to battery no longer exists
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 65 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in 5-6 sec if circuit resistance is above Open Circuit Resistance threshold. Fault Dequalified in 5-6 sec if circuit resistance returns to normal. Resistance threshold for Open circuit: above 5 Ohm
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 65 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. 3) Potential Loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device .

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in 5-6 sec if circuit resistance is below Circuit low Resistance threshold. Fault Dequalifies in 5-6 sec if circuit resistance returns to normal. Resistance threshold for Low circuit resistance: below 1.8 Ohm (With Clockspring). Resistance threshold for Low circuit resistance: below 1.6 Ohm (without Clockspring)..
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment will be attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 65 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified atleast once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in < 5sec (during Pre-Drive) or 5-6 sec (during Drive) if firing loop is cross coupled with another firing loop. Fault Dequalifies in 5-6 sec if cross couple condition no longer exists
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment will be attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 65 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified atleast once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Battery Voltage input in operating voltage range and associated feature not enabled in calibration file
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Incorrect Component Installed. Fault qualifies during Pre-Drive in < 5seconds
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment function of ECU not affected.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 65 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle.
