EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Driver Far Side Airbag Deployment Control

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in < 5sec (during Pre-Drive) or 5-6 sec (during Drive) if circuit short to ground exists. Fault Dequalified in 5-6 sec if circuit short to ground no longer exists.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 99 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in < 5sec (during Pre-Drive) or 5-6 sec (during Drive) if circuit short to battery exists. Fault Dequalified in 5-6 sec if circuit short to battery no longer exists
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 99 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in 5-6 sec if circuit resistance is above Open Circuit Resistance threshold. Fault Dequalified in 5-6 sec if circuit resistance returns to normal. Resistance threshold for Open circuit: above 5 Ohm
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 65 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. 3) Potential Loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device .

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in 5-6 sec if circuit resistance is below Circuit low Resistance threshold. Fault Dequalifies in 5-6 sec if circuit resistance returns to normal. Resistance threshold for Low circuit resistance: below 1.8 Ohm (With Clockspring). Resistance threshold for Low circuit resistance: below 1.6 Ohm (without Clockspring)..
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment will be attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 99 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified atleast once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Qualifies in < 5sec (during Pre-Drive) or 5-6 sec (during Drive) if firing loop is cross coupled with another firing loop. Fault Dequalifies in 5-6 sec if cross couple condition no longer exists
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Deployment will be attempted, even if faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 99 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified atleast once in the key cycle. 3) Potential loss of deployment capability for the affecetd device

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range. and associated feature not enabled in calibration file
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Device not configured but existent and Fault maturation time of 5-6sec during pre-drive are met
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: No effect on deployment decision
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1)AFC = 99 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise may be solid RIL 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle and the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Fourth Row Passenger Side Seatbelt Sensor

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Wireless Beltminder Control Module message (0x487) is set to Faulty for this device and Fault maturation time of 5-6 seconds is met.Fault dematures in 5-6 seconds once fault condition is removed.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: When the Seatbelt sensor is faulted, ECU will use default settings for deployment decisions for associated deployment devices. The ECU will report the Faulty state of the Seatbelt Sensor over CAN bus to IPC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 99 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) If the seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm, the RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. The RIL will not be set if the Seatbelt Sensor is not used as an input into the algorithm. 3) Potential change in deployment performance for affected devices if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm 4) Potential loss of seatbelt warning function if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input for seatbelt warning.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Sensor circuit is shorted to ground and Fault maturation time of 5-6 seconds is met. Fault dematures in 5-6 seconds once fault condition is removed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: When the Seatbelt sensor is faulted, ECU will use default settings for deployment decisions for associated deployment devices. The ECU will report the Faulty state of the Seatbelt Sensor over CAN bus to IPC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 75 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) If the seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm, the RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. The RIL will not be set if the Seatbelt Sensor is not used as an input into the algorithm. 3) Potential change in deployment performance for affected devices if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm 4) Potential loss of seatbelt warning function if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input for seatbelt warning.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Sensor circuit is shorted to battery and fault maturation time of 5-6 seconds is met . Fault dematures in 5-6 seconds once fault condition is removed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: When the Seatbelt sensor is faulted, ECU will use default settings for deployment decisions for associated deployment devices. The ECU will report the Faulty state of the Seatbelt Sensor over CAN bus to IPC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 75 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) If the seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm, the RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. The RIL will not be set if the Seatbelt Sensor is not used as an input into the algorithm. 3) Potential change in deployment performance for affected devices if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm 4) Potential loss of seatbelt warning function if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input for seatbelt warning.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Sensor circuit is Open and Fault maturation time of 5-6 seconds is met. Or, Alternatively, an open circuit on the common ground return for the slow sensors exists and Fault maturation time of 5-6 seconds is met. Fault dematures in 5-6 seconds once fault condition is removed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: When the Seatbelt sensor is faulted, ECU will use default settings for deployment decisions for associated deployment devices. The ECU will report the Faulty state of the Seatbelt Sensor over CAN bus to IPC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 75 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) If the seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm, the RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. The RIL will not be set if the Seatbelt Sensor is not used as an input into the algorithm. 3) Potential change in deployment performance for affected devices if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm 4) Potential loss of seatbelt warning function if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input for seatbelt warning.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Sensor circuit current out of range ( >7.9mA and <9.6mA) and fault maturation of 5-6 seconds is met. Fault dematures in 5-6 seconds once fault condition is removed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: When the Seatbelt sensor is faulted, ECU will use default settings for deployment decisions for associated deployment devices. The ECU will report the Faulty state of the Seatbelt Sensor over CAN bus to IPC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 75 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) If the seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm, the RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. The RIL will not be set if the Seatbelt Sensor is not used as an input into the algorithm. 3) Potential change in deployment performance for affected devices if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm 4) Potential loss of seatbelt warning function if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input for seatbelt warning.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Sensor is cross-coupled with another slow sensor and fault maturation time of 5-6 seconds is met. During Pre-Drive, fault maturation can be less than 5-6 seconds. Or, for Restive type slow Sensors, Sensor Common ground return is open and fault maturation time of 5-6 seconds is met.. Fault dematures in 5-6 seconds once fault condition is removed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: When the Seatbelt sensor is faulted, ECU will use default settings for deployment decisions for associated deployment devices. The ECU will report the Faulty state of the Seatbelt Sensor over CAN bus to IPC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 75 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) If the seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm, the RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. The RIL will not be set if the Seatbelt Sensor is not used as an input into the algorithm. 3) Potential change in deployment performance for affected devices if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm 4) Potential loss of seatbelt warning function if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input for seatbelt warning.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range. and associated feature not enabled in calibration file
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Device not configured but existent and Fault maturation time of 5-6sec during pre-drive are met
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: No effect on deployment decision
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1)AFC = 75 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise may be solid RIL 2) The RIL will be latched for the key cycle and the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Sensor circuit is Open and Fault maturation time of 5-6 seconds is met. Or, Alternatively, an open circuit on the common ground return for the slow sensors exists and Fault maturation time of 5-6 seconds is met. Fault dematures in 5-6 seconds once fault condition is removed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: When the Seatbelt sensor is faulted, ECU will use default settings for deployment decisions for associated deployment devices. The ECU will report the Faulty state of the Seatbelt Sensor over CAN bus to IPC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 75 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) If the seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm, the RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. The RIL will not be set if the Seatbelt Sensor is not used as an input into the algorithm. 3) Potential change in deployment performance for affected devices if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm 4) Potential loss of seatbelt warning function if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input for seatbelt warning.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Third Row Driver Center Seatbelt Sensor

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Wireless Beltminder Control Module message (0x487) is set to Faulty for this device and Fault maturation time of 5-6 seconds is met.Fault dematures in 5-6 seconds once fault condition is removed.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: When the Seatbelt sensor is faulted, ECU will use default settings for deployment decisions for associated deployment devices. The ECU will report the Faulty state of the Seatbelt Sensor over CAN bus to IPC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 99 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) If the seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm, the RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. The RIL will not be set if the Seatbelt Sensor is not used as an input into the algorithm. 3) Potential change in deployment performance for affected devices if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm 4) Potential loss of seatbelt warning function if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input for seatbelt warning.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: When the Seatbelt sensor is faulted, ECU will use default settings for deployment decisions for associated deployment devices. The ECU will report the Faulty state of the Seatbelt Sensor over CAN bus to IPC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 99 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) If the seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm, the RIL will be latched for the key cycle if the fault is qualified at least once in the key cycle. The RIL will not be set if the Seatbelt Sensor is not used as an input into the algorithm. 3) Potential change in deployment performance for affected devices if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input into the algorithm 4) Potential loss of seatbelt warning function if the Seatbelt Sensor is used as an input for seatbelt warning.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: NA

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Speed (0x202) TransGearData (0x230)message "missing" for 6seconds will trigger the setting of this DTC. This DTC will be logged only when Ignition_Status is Run and is not logged in Energy Reserve or Extended Energy Reserve mode. This Fault dematures upon receiving one message. Signal Timeouts GearLvrPos_D_Actl(0x76) - 400msec Veh_V_ActlEng(0x202) - 400msec
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU uses last valid value for signal Veh_V_ActlEng, GearlvrPos_D_Actl if the message 0x202,0x230 goes missing in the key cycle. If the message 0x202,0x230 was never received on that key cycle, then the ECU uses DBC default value(0kph), 0x0E for signal Veh_V_ActlEng, GearLvrPos_D_Actl respectively.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 71 for Speed(0x202) and AFC = 99 for TransGearData (0x230) when Assembly Flash codes enabled.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Battery Energy Control Module "B"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Power_Stat (0x456) message "missing" for 6 seconds will trigger the setting of this DTC. This DTC will be logged only when Ignition_Status is Run and is not logged in Energy Reserve or Extended Energy Reserve mode. This Fault dematures upon receiving one message. Signal Timeouts RstrnMdulePw_D_Falt(0x456) - 1500msec Message 0x456 "Power_Stat" missing message and DE01 byte 8 bit 7 "EPM Integrated into the BCM" is 0
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU uses last valid value for signal RstrnMdulePw_D_Falt if the 0x456 goes missing in the key cycle until time T1 later uses the DBC default value(0x1Fault). If the message 0x456 was never received on that key cycle, the ECU uses DBC default value(0x1 Fault) for the signal RstrnMdulePw_D_Falt.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 14 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present .

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

This DTC will be logged only when Ignition_Status is Run and is not logged in Energy Reserve or Extended Energy Reserve mode. This Fault dematures upon receiving one message. Signal Timeouts WhlRotatFr_No_Cnt(0x216) - 400msec WhlRr_W_Meas(0x217) - 400msec
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU uses last valid value for signal WhlRotatFr_No_Cnt, WhlRr_W_Meas if the 0x216, 0x217 goes missing in the key cycle until time T1 later uses the DBC default value(0x1Fault).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 99 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present .

This DTC will be logged only when Ignition_Status is Run and is not logged in Energy Reserve or Extended Energy Reserve mode. This Fault dematures upon receiving one message. Signal Timeouts StePinComp_An_Est(0x7E) - 400msec
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU uses last valid value for signal StePinComp_An_Est(0x7E) goes missing in the key cycle until time T1 later uses the DBC default value(0x0Fault).

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Body Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: BCM ( 0x3B3/0x3C3) message "missing" for 6 seconds/(0x40A) missing for 8 seconds will trigger the setting of thisDTC. This DTC(0x40A/0x3C3) will be logged when Ignition_Status is Run. This DTC(0x40A/0x3C3/0x3B3) will not be logged in Energy Reserve or Extended Energy Reserve mode. This Fault dematures upon receiving one message. Signal Timeouts Ignition_Status(0x3B3)- 1000msec ImpactEvntFdbck_D_Stat(0x3C3) - 1500msec VehicleGGCCData(0x40A) -600 msec This DTC will be logged if EPM configured to Receive from BCM and BCM is missing for greater than 6sec, This DTC will be logged if 0x40A "GGCC_Config_Mgmt_ID_1", 0x3B3 "BodyInfo_3", or 0x3C3 "BCM_Lamp_Stat" missing message Or, message 0x456 "Power_Stat" missing message and DE01 byte 8 bit 7 "EPM Integrated into the BCM" is 1
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU uses last valid value for signals Ignition_Status & Day_Night_Status if the 0x3B3 goes missing in the key cycle until time T1 later uses "Run0x04" for signal Ignition_Status and "Day0x01" for signal Day_Night_Status . If the message 0x3B3 was never received on that key cycle, then the ECU uses "Run0x04" for signal Ignition_Status and "Day0x01" for signal Day_Night_Status. ECU uses last valid value for signal ImpactEvntFdbck_D_Stat if the 0x3C3 goes missing in the key cycle until time T1 later uses the DBC default value(0x0 Normal). If the message 0x3C3 was never received on that key cycle, then the ECU uses DBC default value(0x0 Normal)for the signal ImpactEvntFdbck_D_Stat . ECU uses last valid value for signal Global Real Time if the 0x40A goes missing in the key cycle . If the message 0x40A was never received on that key cycle, then the ECU uses DBC default value(0x0) is used for the signal Global real Time. deployment capability will be disabled if valid RCMAuxID has never been received in the life of that ECU. If valid RCMAuxID has been received once within the life of the ECU, the deployment capability shall not be restricted due to missing Calibration ID
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: Potential loss of Deployment capability if RCMAuxID never received. Potential loss of event data recording elements. Potential loss of DTC snapshot record elements. Potential for improper PADI illumination intensity. Potential for fuel cutoff event to be unable to reset. 0x3B3: ignition status there is no impact on restraint function. 0x3C3: Impact event status- Impact Event Notification function may be affected 0x40A: Deployment function may be affected Potential RIL performances affected

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Serial Data Gateway "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Dual CAN PADI message(0x78) "missing" for 6 seconds will trigger the setting of the DTC.This DTC will be logged only when Ignition_Status is Run and is not logged in Energy Reserve or Extended Energy Reserve mode. Menu ACS (0x44C) "missing" for 6 seconds will trigger the setting of the DTC and door Removable (0x43B) "missing" for 6 - 7 seconds will trigger the setting of the DTC This Fault dematures upon receiving one message. Signal Timeouts PassRstrnInd_Stat (0x78) - 400ms RstrnOnPsngr_D_RqMnu(0x44C) - 1500ms
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU uses last valid value for signal PassRstrnInd_Stat if the 0x78 goes missing & RstrnOnPsngr_D_RqMnu for 0x44C goes missing in the key cycle until time T1 later uses the DBC default value(0x1Normal) for 0x78 and (0x0Normal) for 0x44C. If the message 0x78 or 0x44C was never received on that key cycle, then the ECU uses DBC default value(0x1 Normal) for the signal PassRstrnInd_Stat & (0x0 Normal) for the signal RstrnOnPsngr_D_RqMnu.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 78 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise one of the following: - For CAN PADI faults, Removable door faults, or menu ACS faults (assuming feature is enabled/expected): Solid RIL when fault present - For only EDR related messages: No RIL when fault present

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication with Restraints Occupant Classification System Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Any OCS message (0x265,0x453) "missing" for 6 seconds will trigger the setting of the DTC. This DTC will be logged only when Ignition_Status is Run and is not logged in Energy Reserve or Extended Energy Reserve mode. This Fault dematures upon receiving one message. Signal Timeouts VehicleCalibrationId(0x265) - 1500 msec OCSSerialNoByte1(0x265) - 1500msec
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU uses last valid value for signal BeltWarnThres_D_Stat if the 0x265 goes missing in the key cycle until time T1 later uses the DBC default value(0x6No_Data_Exists). If the message 0x265 was never received on that key cycle, then the ECU uses DBC default value (0x6No_Data_Exists) for the signal BeltWarnThres_D_Stat ECU uses the value according to RESS2.11.20-13 for signal OCS Status if the 0x265 goes missing in the key cycle / was never received on that key cycle.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 68 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: (0x81) "missing" for 6 seconds will trigger the setting of the DTC. This DTC will be logged only when Ignition_Status is Run and is not logged in Energy Reserve or Extended Energy Reserve mode.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU uses last valid value for signal AirbagDrv_B_RqDactv if the 0x81 goes missing in the key cycle until time T1 later uses the DBC default value(0x6No_Data_Exists). If the message 0x81 was never received on that key cycle, then the ECU uses DBC default value (0x6No_Data_Exists) for the signal AirbagDrv_B_RqDactv ECU uses the value according to RESS2.11.20-13 for message 0x81 goes missing in the key cycle / was never received on that key cycle.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 99 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The HitchToVehAxle_L_Calc(0x459) "missing" for 6 seconds will trigger the setting of the DTC. This DTC will be logged only when Ignition_Status is Run and is not logged in Energy Reserve or Extended Energy Reserve mode. This Fault dematures upon receiving one message. Signal Timeouts HitchToVehAxle_L_Calc(0x459) - 400 msec
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU uses last valid value for signal HitchToVehAxle_L_Calc if the 0x459 goes missing in the key cycle until time T1 later uses the DBC default value(0x0Normal). If the message 0x459 was never received on that key cycle, then the ECU uses DBC default value(0x0Normal )for the signal HitchToVehAxle_L_Calc

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault is matured immediately upon detecting that the calibration sector version does not match with the expected strategy sector versions
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU Deployment functionality may be affected.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 54 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received from ECM/PCM A

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault is logged upon receiving invalid Data "Faulty" in signal VehVActlEng_D_Qf (0x202),GearLvrPos_D_Actl(0x230) for 6 seconds. This DTC will be logged only when Ignition_Status is Run and is not logged in Energy Reserve or Extended Energy Reserve mode. Fault is de-matured with one valid data ( "OK" or "Not_Within_Specifications" or "No_Data_Exists" ) in signal VehVActlEng_D_Qf (0x202) and one valid data GearLvrPos_D_Actl(0x230).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU uses last valid value for signal VehVActlEng_D_Qf in message 0x202, GearLvrPos_D_Actl in message 0x230 if the signal is invalid during the key cycle until time T1 later uses the DBC default value(0x0Faulty). If the signal VehVActlEng_D_Qf,GearLvrPos_D_Actl was invalid from the begining of that key cycle, then the ECU uses DBC default value(0x0 Faulty) for the signal VehVActlEng_D_Qf,GearLvrPos_D_Actl .
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 71 for EngVehicleSpThrottle2 (0x202) when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present and AFC = 99 for TransGearData (0x230) when Assembly Flash codes enabled.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault is logged upon receiving invalid Data "No_Data_Exists" in signal VehVActlEng_D_Qf (0x202),GearLvrPos_D_Actl(0x230) for 6 seconds. This DTC will be logged only when Ignition_Status is Run and is not logged in Energy Reserve or Extended Energy Reserve mode. Fault is de-matured with one valid data ( "OK" or "Not_Within_Specifications" or "Faulty") in signal VehVActlEng_D_Qf (0x202) & one valid data in signal GearLvrPos_D_Actl(0x230).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU uses last valid value for signal VehVActlEng_D_Qf in message 0x202, GearLvrPos_D_Actl in message 0x230 if the signal is invalid during the key cycle until time T1 later uses the DBC default value(0x0Faulty). If the signal VehVActlEng_D_Qf,GearLvrPos_D_Actl was invalid from the begining of that key cycle, then the ECU uses DBC default value(0x0 Faulty) for the signal VehVActlEng_D_Qf,GearLvrPos_D_Actl .
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 71 for message 0x202 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. AFC = 99 for message 0x230 when Assembly Flash codes enabled

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU uses last valid value for signal RstrnMdulePw_D_Falt in message 0x456 if the signal is invalid during the key cycle until time T1 later uses the DBC default value(0x1Fault). If the signal RstrnMdulePw_D_Falt was invalid from the begining of that key cycle, then the ECU uses DBC default value(0x1 Fault) for the signal RstrnMdulePw_D_Falt .
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 14 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Body Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault is logged upon receiving invalid Data Ignition_Status = "Invalid(Anything other than "Run" or "Unknown" or "Accessory" or "Start" or "Off")" in message 0x3B3 (or) ImpactEvntFdbck_D_Stat = "Notused" in message 0x3C3 for 6 seconds. This DTC (0x3C3) will be logged only when Ignition_Status is Run. This DTC(0x3C3/0x3B3) will not be logged in Energy Reserve or Extended Energy Reserve mode. Fault is de-matured with one valid data ("Run" or "Unknown" or "Accessory" or "Start" or "Off") in signal Ignition_Status or one valid data("Normal" or "EvenInProgress" or "EventComplete") in signal ImpactEvntFdbck_D_Stat . This DTC will be logged ,Message 0x3B3 "BodyInfo_3" or 0x3C3 "BCM_Lamp_Stat" has QF=Faulty/Degrated or SV=Invalid Or, Message 0x456 "Power_Stat", signal "RstrnMdulePw_D_Falt"=0x0 "Null" or 0x3 "NotUsed_1" and DE01 byte 8 bit 7 "EPM Integrated into the BCM" is 1
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU uses last valid value for signal Ignition_Status in the message 0x3B3 until time T1 later uses "Run0x04" if the signal becomes invalid during the key cycle .If the signal Ignition_Status was invalid from the begining of that key cycle, then value (0x4Run) is used for the signal Ignition_Status . ECU uses last valid value for signal ImpactEvntFdbck_D_Stat in the message 0x3C3 until time T1 later uses "0x0Normal" if the signal becomes invalid during the key cycle .If the signal ImpactEvntFdbck_D_Stat was invalid from the begining of that key cycle, then value (0x0Normal) is used for the signal ImpactEvntFdbck_D_Stat .
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: "AFC = 77 when Assembly Flash codes enabled(While in Plant Mode) otherwise (When Out Of Plant Mode) - for non-related failures to PADI Dimming feature: solid RIL. - for PADI Dimming feature related failures: No RIL."

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU uses last valid value for signal Ignition_Status in the message 0x3B3 until time T1 later uses "Run0x04" if the signal becomes invalid during the key cycle .If the signal Ignition_Status was invalid from the begining of that key cycle, then value (0x4Run) is used for the signal Ignition_Status .
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 99 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 77 when Assembly Flash codes enabled(While in Plant Mode) otherwise (When Out Of Plant Mode) - for non-related failures to PADI Dimming feature: solid RIL. - for PADI Dimming feature related failures: No RIL

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU uses last valid value for signal DrPresentDrv_D_Stat in message 0x43B if the signal is invalid during the key cycle until time T1 later uses the default value(0x1)Fault). If the signal DrPresentDrv_D_Stat was invalid from the begining of that key cycle, then the ECU uses default value(0x1 Fault) for the signal DrPresentDrv_D_Stat.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 99 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault is logged upon receiving invalid Data "Faulty" in signal HitchToVehAxle_L_Calc(0x459) for 6 seconds. This DTC will be logged only when Ignition_Status is Run and is not logged in Energy Reserve or Extended Energy Reserve mode. Fault is de-matured with one valid data in signal HitchToVehAxle_L_Calc(0x459).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU uses last valid value for signal HitchToVehAxle_L_Calc in message (0x459) if the signal is invalid during the key cycle until time T1 later uses the DBC default value(0x0Faulty). If the signal HitchToVehAxle_L_Calc was invalid from the begining of that key cycle, then the ECU uses DBC default value(0x0 Faulty) for the signals HitchToVehAxle_L_Calc.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 99 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault is logged upon receiving invalid data eCallConfirmation = "Unused2" received from (0x455)message for 6 seconds.This DTC will be logged only when Ignition_Status is Run and is not logged in Energy Reserve or Extended Energy Reserve mode. Fault is de-matured with one valid data(Normal" or "Call_In_Progress" or "Call_Completed" or "Call_Cancelled" or "Call_Unsuccessful" or "eCall_Configured_Off" or "CallComplete_DTMF_Timeout" ) signal eCallConfirmation .
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU uses last valid value for signal eCallConfirmation in the message 0x455 until time T1 later uses "0x0Normal" if the signal becomes invalid during the key cycle .If the signal eCallConfirmation was invalid from the begining of that key cycle, then value (0x0Normal) is used for the signal eCallConfirmation .
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 73 when Assembly Flash codes enabled(While in Palnt Mode) otherwise (When Out Of Palnt Mode) no RIL when fault present.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU uses last valid value for signal PassRstrnInd_Stat_UB in the message 0x78 until time T1 later uses "0x0Unchanged_data " if the signal becomes invalid during the key cycle .If the signal PassRstrnInd_Stat_UB was invalid from the begining of that key cycle, then value (0x0Unchanged_data ) is used for the signal PassRstrnInd_Stat_UB .

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU Deployment functionality may be affected.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault is matured immediately upon detecting that OEM Configuration NvM Block is corrupted(Checksum error,Block does't exist ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: RCM willl respond to service $2E with NRC 0x26 for the Configuration DID's (0xDE00 - 0xDE03) write when this DTC is active.Prevents inhale process from being performed on modules to be replaced.Service uses as-built database to configure new module.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 12 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault is matured for any of the following reasons. 1.ECU has not received RCM Aux ID from central configuration module via HSCAN message. or 2.Received RCM AuxID is not matching with the Expected RCM Aux ID supported by the RCM end-item part. or 3.ECU has not received "Steering Wheel Location" from central configuration module via HSCAN message since initial installation. or 4.Steering Wheel Location" received from central configuration module does not match with directly configured DE01 Steering Wheel Location. or 5.After reflash of ECU software or 6. After starting Routine $0E06 and if RCM Aux ID & Steering wheel location have changed from that originally learned or 7.After issuing routine 0E08. Fault is dematured upon confirming that received AuxID/SteeringWheel matches with the expected configuration.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU Deployment functionality is disabled.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 54 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault is matured for any of the following reasons.This DTC will be logged only when Ignition_Status is Run and is not logged in Energy Reserve or Extended Energy Reserve mode. 1.Accepted "RCM Aux ID" does not match "RCM Aux ID" received from central configuration module via HSCAN message with in calibratable seconds(8sec ECVC)from key on. OR 2. Accepted "Steering Wheel Location" does not match "Steering Wheel Location" received from central configuration module via HSCAN message with in calibratable seconds(8sec ECVC)from key on. OR 3. RCM Aux Id" received does not point to the same calibration file as the "RCM Configuration ID" configured into DID DE02 at EOL with in calibratable seconds(8sec ECVC)from key on. OR 4. Received Central configuration value of "Steering Wheel Location" does not match the directly configured "Steering Wheel Location" in DID DE01 with in calibratable seconds(8sec ECVC)from key on. OR 5.Steering Wheel Location or RCM Aux ID CDID not received with in calibratable seconds(8sec ECVC)from key on. Fault is de-matured upon confirming that received AuxID/SteeringWheel matches with expected configuration.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU uses the last valid Calibration ID for Calibration selection.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 54 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Associated feature enabled in calibration file and Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault is logged upon temporary disturbance fault detected with a lat/long/vert/yaw/roll sensor (or) IMU Calibration is not performed on the module.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: 1)Lat/long/vert/yaw/roll sensor CAN QF state is set to 0x0 Faulty 2)Functions in ECUs receiving lat/long/vert/yaw/roll sensor may be affected 3)ECU Deployment functionalitymay be affected.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 12 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) If F000 04 is triggered due IMU is not calibrated, then, the RIL will not be turned ON.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault matuired immediate upon detecting the incomplete EEPROM (Strategy present but EEPROM incomplete) or Corrupted EEPROM (Block Checksum Failure)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU deployment function may be affected
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 54 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Matured on Event of Internal Failure occurrence of module. This could be caused by any of the following reasons: 1)Deployment circuit internal fault , 2)Power supply internal fault, 3)Satellite ASIC fault, 4)On Board sensor fault, 5)Internal safing fault, 6)If the Algorithm exceeding deployment threshold X (Default setting for X is 5 and can be calibratable) or more times in a key cycle without confirmation of a deployment decision by the Safing Algorithm then this DTC is set. 7)If the module is rolled slowly and end up in the upside down position, then a low g saturation fault is set. See hex DID $D703 for the categories.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU deployment function may be affected, depending on the type of Internal Failure.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the following may be observed: 1) AFC = 12 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present. 2) If F00049 is triggered due to the faulted internal component towards a non-restraints function(IMU), then, the RIL will not be turned ON.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Circuit Voltage below threshold could be set due to any of the following reasons: 1)A level 1 fault is qualified while the system is in Low Voltage Condition(Module input voltage is approximately below 8V) 2)If the duration of proveout exceeds 8.0 seconds due to Operational Voltage is approximately below 6.8V. 3)If the duration of proveout exceeds 8.0 seconds due to Operational Voltage is approximately above 18V. Pass Criteria: 1)System finishes proveout and transitions to normal mode 2)Low voltage condition is removed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU Diagnostics functionality may be affected.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 66 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present.

EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS.EDR_REFS: edr_02 edr_03 edr_04 edr_10 edr_11 edr_12

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Battery Voltage input is in operating voltage range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Circuit Voltage above threshold could be set due to any of the following reasons: 1)A level 1 fault is qualified while the system is in High Voltage Condition(Module input voltage is approximately above 16V) 2)If the duration of proveout exceeds 8.0 seconds due to battery voltage is greater than 18 V. Pass Criteria: High voltage condition is removed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU Diagnostics functionality may be affected.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AFC = 67 when Assembly Flash codes enabled otherwise solid RIL when fault present.
